title: rubus arduennensis subsp. grabowskii
intro: Rubus arduennensis subsp. grabowskii, also known as the Grabowski's raspberry, is a subspecies of raspberry plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating wounds, infections, and various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and preventing oxidative stress, which can help to alleviate symptoms of various diseases such as arthritis, diabetes, and cancer. Herbal preparations of Rubus arduennensis subsp. grabowskii can be made into teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
